slides.title: Locking the Box 🔒
slides.content:
Sometimes a value should never change (like your birthdate).

Use `final` or `const` to lock the variable.

slides.title: Using final
slides.content: Once assigned, a `final` variable cannot be altered.

quizData.question: Which keyword makes a variable unchangeable?

slides.title: const vs final
slides.content: `const` is for values known at compile-time (like `const pi = 3.14`), while `final` can be determined while the app runs.
